assertions.description: Output includes all required sections: Platform Fit Assessment, Content Approach, Distinctive Angle, 90-Day Targets, 12-Month Targets, and Key Risk
The platform fit assessment honestly identifies at least one weakness, not just opportunities
90-day targets are specific and measurable with realistic numbers for the stated resource level

assertion_results.note: All six sections present with appropriate depth
Notes TikTok's entertainment-first culture as challenge for serious investigative content
90-day targets realistic for one part-time coordinator: follower growth, posting rhythm, content type testing
All sections present even with minimal input
Identifies LinkedIn's professional register as potential mismatch for true crime content
Targets scaled to individual creator resource level
All sections present with multilingual considerations addressed
Notes challenge of serving three language audiences on one account
90-day targets realistic for two-person team managing multilingual content

methodology: Binary assertion testing: 3 inputs (standard, minimal, European context) x 3 assertions per skill. Each assertion graded pass/fail based on whether generated output satisfies the requirement.
